sourceRefs.summary: Fig. 3 maps to broad H3K4me3/H3K27ac domain discovery and overlap claims.
Fig. 3 legend and result text for broad H3K4me3/H3K27ac domains.

inputRefs.summary: Broad H3K4me3 domains: 5136 data rows; Broad H3K27ac domains: 4533 data rows.
Broad-domain definition: merge peaks within 500 bp and retain intervals longer than 5 kb.

codeRefs.summary: Parsed workbook SpreadsheetML locally and computed interval lengths, stage broad-status counts, and sorted interval overlaps.

outputFigureRefs.summary: Table-level reproduction: all H3K4me3 domains are >=5001 bp; median length 6884 bp; RS4 broad count 4085 and RS8 broad count 2147.
Table-level overlap: any listed H3K27ac broad domains overlap listed H3K4me3 broad domains at 73.7% overall, 79.8% in RS2, 72.4% in RS4, and 68.6% in RS8 under any-base overlap.

statisticsRefs.summary: H3K4me3 domain features from S5: Promoter 3261, Distal 1875; H3K27ac features: Promoter 2988, Distal 1545.

stdoutRefs.summary: Local parse stdout recorded row counts, length summaries, stage counts, and overlap percentages.

stderrRefs.summary: No stderr from bounded local supplement parse.

limitations: This is a table-level reproduction from published Supplementary Table S5, not an independent ChIP-seq peak-calling run from raw FASTQ or processed BED/bigWig.
Broad-vs-sharp H3K4me3 cannot be fully reproduced from S5 alone because sharp/control H3K4me3 peak lists and peak-height ranking inputs are not included in the local supplement subset.
The H3K27ac overlap fraction is sensitive to denominator, stage subset, and overlap definition; under any-base overlap it is near but not identical to the paper text for every stage.
diagnostics: Structured partial: broad-domain count and width threshold are supported by local Table S5.
Structured insufficient-evidence: independent broad-domain calling and sharp-peak controls require processed peaks/signals that were not downloaded.
